description: Heel: 3" Open toed thong style upper with a wide midfoot strap and a toe separator Stone, bead and gold thread embellishment all over the straps Metallic grey footbed with branding at the heel Wedge heel at the midfoot and heel region Grooves at the forefoot and midfoot region15 days warranty for sole debonding only; no warranty on studs, sequins or other accessories (warranty not valid on products under discount or promotional offer)
